git-commit-helper.name: git-commit-helper
git-commit-helper.description: Generates conventional commit messages from staged changes. Analyzes git diff to produce clear, descriptive commit messages.

code-reviewer.name: code-reviewer
code-reviewer.description: Expert code review specialist. Reviews code for quality, security, and maintainability. Checks for OWASP top 10 vulnerabilities.
code-reviewer.notes: Pairs well with git-commit-helper for PR workflow

note-writer.name: note-writer
note-writer.description: Captures conversation insights into structured notes. Routes to correct vault folder with proper frontmatter and wikilinks.

note-finder.name: note-finder
note-finder.description: Searches across multiple knowledge vaults to find relevant notes. Supports cross-vault search with smart ranking.

article-workflow.name: article-workflow
article-workflow.description: End-to-end writing workflow orchestrator. From topic selection to drafting, editing, and publishing preparation.
article-workflow.notes: The most complex skill — orchestrates the full writing pipeline

image-generator.name: image-generator
image-generator.description: AI image generation with multiple providers. Supports text-to-image with style presets and automatic fallback.

task-manager.name: task-manager
task-manager.description: Cross-tool task management hub. Reads and updates daily tasks, backlog, and fixed routines across AI tools.

device-manager.name: device-manager
device-manager.description: Manages SSH connections, server health checks, and Tailscale network. Handles device inventory and deployment keys.

slide-deck.name: slide-deck
slide-deck.description: Generates professional slide deck images from content outline. Multiple visual styles and layout types available.

debug-helper.name: debug-helper
debug-helper.description: Systematic debugging specialist. Follows a structured approach: reproduce, isolate, identify root cause, fix, verify.
